mapper.select: SELECT HIS_NO as hisNo, CONTRACT_NO as contractNo, HISTORY_TYPE_CD as historyTypeCd, HISTORY_CONTENTS as historyContents, REG_ID as regId, REG_DT as regDt FROM TS_WORK_SW_HISTORY WHERE HISTORY_ID = #{historyId}

SELECT HIS_NO as hisNo, CONTRACT_NO as contractNo, HISTORY_TYPE_CD as historyTypeCd, HISTORY_CONTENTS as historyContents, REG_ID as regId, REG_DT as regDt FROM TS_WORK_SW_HISTORY WHERE CONTRACT_NO = #{contractNo} AND USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY HISTORY_SEQ ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE TS_WORK_SW_HISTORY SET HISTORY_CONTENTS = #{historyContents}, MOD_ID = #{modId}, MOD_DT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE HISTORY_ID = #{historyId}
mapper.select:
SELECT h.HISTORY_ID as historyId, h.CONTRACT_NO as contractNo, c.CONTRACT_YEAR as contractYear, c.SUB_CD as subCd, s.SW_NM as swName, cust.COMPANY_NM as customerCompanyNm, cust.DEPARTMENT_NM as customerDepartmentNm, cust.MANAGE_NM as customerManageNm, c.DEPT_CD as customerDeptCd, part_dept.COMPANY_NM as partnerCompanyNm, p.COMP_CODE as partnerDeptCd, h.HISTORY_SEQ as historySeq, h.HISTORY_TYPE_CD as historyTypeCd, h.HISTORY_CONTENTS as historyContents FROM TS_WORK_SW_HISTORY h INNER JOIN TS_WORK_CONTRACT c ON h.CONTRACT_NO = c.CONTRACT_NO INNER JOIN TS_WORK_SW_PARTNER p ON c.SUB_CD = p.SUB_CODE INNER JOIN TS_WORK_SW s ON p.SW_CD = s.SW_CD LEFT JOIN TS_COMMON_DEPT cust ON c.DEPT_CD = cust.ORIGIN_CD LEFT JOIN TS_COMMON_DEPT part_dept ON p.COMP_CODE = part_dept.ORIGIN_CD
AND c.CONTRACT_YEAR = #{contractYear}
AND h.USE_YN = 'Y'
AND s.SW_NM LIKE '%' || #{swName} || '%'
ORDER BY h.REG_DT DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{pageSize} ROWS ONLY

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TS_WORK_SW_HISTORY h INNER JOIN TS_WORK_CONTRACT c ON h.CONTRACT_NO = c.CONTRACT_NO INNER JOIN TS_WORK_SW_PARTNER p ON c.SUB_CD = p.SUB_CODE INNER JOIN TS_WORK_SW s ON p.SW_CD = s.SW_CD
AND c.CONTRACT_YEAR = #{contractYear}
AND h.USE_YN = 'Y'
AND s.SW_NM LIKE '%' || #{swName} || '%'
